parameters.jsonBody:
={
  "user_email": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.email }}",
  "stripe_customer_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.customerId }}",
  "invoice_id": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.invoiceId }}",
  "event_type": "payment_failed",
  "attempt_count": {{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.attemptCount }},
  "amount_due": {{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.amountDue }},
  "currency": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.currency }}",
  "suspended": {{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.isSuspended }},
  "next_retry_at": {{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.nextPaymentAttempt ? '"' + $('Merge User Data').first().json.nextRetryDisplay + '"' : 'null' }},
  "occurred_at": "{{ $('Merge User Data').first().json.updatedAt }}"
}
